title: Named window via the windows: clause
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_named_window/0` that uses a named window specification in the `windows:` clause. Define one window `w` with `partition_by: :category_id, order_by: [desc: :inserted_at]`, then reference it twice: once as `row_number() |> over(:w)` and once as `rank() |> over(:w)`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: The `windows:` clause is the advanced form; Claude rarely uses it and tends to inline partition_by into each window function.
